data.description:
## What
Write an ADR-style note documenting the config format/precedence/discovery model, and confirm tomllib is usable.

## Key fact
requires-python is ALREADY >=3.11 (pyproject.toml:16); tomllib needs no fallback/core dep. ruff target-version=py310 (pyproject.toml:105) is a LINT target only — optionally bump to py311.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] docs/ ADR: TOML [tool.rebar]+rebar.toml, precedence CLI>env>project>user>defaults, upward+XDG discovery, stdlib-only (no pydantic-settings/platformdirs)
- [ ] Confirm tomllib import works on the 3.11 floor; record that no fallback is needed
data.title: Config ADR + confirm tomllib floor (no fallback)
